---
name: Proposal
about: Propose a change before writing any code
title: "[Proposal] "
labels: proposal
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What pain point or gap does this address? Why does it matter?

## Proposed Solution

How would you solve it? Describe your technical approach, the files/areas affected, and any trade-offs.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you evaluate? Why is the proposed solution better?

## Scope

- [ ] Small fix (typo, minor bug, styling tweak)
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor or architectural change
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, related issues, or other context that helps evaluate this proposal.
